BackstoryDef.title: Internet content creator
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: In [PAWN_possessive] early adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] would upload informational videos to the internet, commonly reviewing news stories and new products that would come out. Over the years [PAWN_possessive] following grew larger and larger until they were considered 'famous', and their word could influence a lot of people. In [PAWN_possessive] later years of stardom, their following quickly fell off due to them being unable to keep up with modern trends, leaving them as a forgotten icon in a bygone era.
